name: Domtar Corporation
description: Domtar Corporation is a leading North American manufacturer of diversified forest products, specializing in the production of pulp, paper, packaging, tissue, and wood products. With a strong commitment to sustainability and environmental stewardship, the company transforms wood fiber into essential, high-quality solutions for businesses and consumers worldwide. Headquartered in the United States, Domtar operates numerous manufacturing and converting facilities across North America, employing thousands of people dedicated to excellence in the fiber-based industry. The company focuses on innovation and operational efficiency to meet the evolving needs of the global market while maintaining responsible forestry practices.
